purpose: Close the post-merge Prisma drift defect without editing the accepted migration: move the pre-tenant request table to a bounded PostgreSQL schema through a forward-only compatibility migration, bind the runtime to the new EXECUTE-only functions and preserve previous-image rollback through public wrappers.
forbiddenCapabilities: creating Organization, User, membership, role or tenant authority
weakening RLS, audit, outbox, rate limits, consent or idempotency
changing packages, lockfiles, Caddy, deployment topology or production secrets
acceptance: new forward-only migration moves the request table out of Prisma-managed public schema
old public functions remain rollback-compatible wrappers
new runtime uses organization_intake EXECUTE-only functions
Prisma drift check passes after all migrations
restricted-principal E2E proves request audit and outbox atomicity
no temporary workflow remains in the final diff
